channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Murder trial of tech consultant in death of Cash App founder Bob Lee begins
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — The murder trial of a tech consultant in the stabbing death of Cash App founder Bob Lee begins Monday, a year and a half after the widely admired entrepreneur was found staggering on a deserted downtown San Francisco street seeking help.
item.dc:creator: JANIE HAR, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: This 3D-printed Texas hotel is shaking up the construction industry
item.description: The Vulcan is Icon's massive 3D printer, which stands 15½ feet tall and weighs 4.75 tons. It's capable of creating buildings with 12-foot-high curving walls.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Volunteers bring solar power to Hurricane Helene's disaster zone
item.description: Nearly two weeks after Hurricane Helene downed power lines and washed out roads all over North Carolina’s mountains, the roar of gas-powered generators is both unpleasant and essential.
item.dc:creator: Gabriela Aoun Angueira, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: What to do if you lose your phone
item.description: Phones hold so much of our digital lives—emails, social media and bank accounts, photos, chat messages and more—that if they ever get stolen or go missing, it can cause major disruption beyond just the loss of a device.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: What's behind the northern lights that dazzled the sky farther south than normal
item.description: The latest solar storm has triggered northern lights farther south than normal including into parts of Germany, the United Kingdom, New England and New York City.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Climate Change Intensifies Hurricanes: New Study Reveals 20-30% Increased Rainfall
item.description: Human-caused climate change worsened Hurricane Milton's rainfall by 20 to 30% and strengthened its winds, a new study reveals. Scientists warn of the devastating impact on the southeastern United States.
item.dc:creator: Alexa St. John, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Hurricane Milton has caused thousands of flight cancellations, is yours one of them? What to know
item.description: Thousands of flights in and out of the U.S. have been canceled this week as Hurricane Milton barreled into the Gulf of Mexico and plowed across Florida.
item.dc:creator: Wyatte Grantham-Philips And David Koenig, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: How a Cold War plan to stop nuclear proliferation could protect the world from an AI arms race
item.description: As Mark Twain said, “History doesn’t often repeat itself, but it does rhyme.” We are fortunate that it does, because it means we can use lessons from the past at least as a rough guide to the present.
item.dc:creator: Ash Jogalekar, Fast Company

item.title: AI tracker charts growth in deepfakes ahead of election
item.description: The German Marshall Fund has launched a tool to track deepfakes created by artificial intelligence (AI) that are targeting elections and circulating in the U.S. and across the globe. The tool comes in a historic year for elections.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, The Hill

item.title: Wimbledon tennis tournament replaces human line judges with electronic system
item.description: Wimbledon is replacing line judges with electronic line-calling, the latest step into the modern age by the oldest Grand Slam tennis tournament.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: OpenAI says cybercriminals are using ChatGPT more to influence elections
item.description: OpenAI has seen a number of attempts where its AI models have been used to generate fake content, including long-form articles and social media comments, aimed at influencing elections, the ChatGPT maker said in a report on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Greene takes fire for remarks about weather
item.description: Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene (R-Ga.) has again thrown herself at the center of controversy over her embrace of claims that the government and humans are “controlling” the severe weather as Hurricane Milton barrels toward Florida.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Musk steps up Starlink access as Hurricane Milton approaches Florida
item.description: SpaceX and CEO Elon Musk ramped up the rollout of Starlink's direct-to-cell service for areas expected to be hit Wednesday by Hurricane Milton, marking the latest assistance efforts by the aerospace company.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: American Water cyberattack renews focus on protecting critical infrastructure
item.description: CAMDEN, N.J. (AP) — A cyberattack continues to affect the largest regulated water and wastewater utility company in the United States, renewing a focus on the importance of protecting critical infrastructure sites.
item.dc:creator: BRUCE SHIPKOWSKI, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: TikTok is designed to be addictive to kids and causes them harm, US states' lawsuits say
item.description: More than a dozen states and the District of Columbia filed lawsuits against TikTok on Tuesday, saying that the popular short-form video app is designed to be addictive to kids and harms their mental health.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, NewsNation
